nodes.title: Add warning when the user defined references that are not used.
Add DOI to nextflow.config
The bakta database dowloaded by conda and docker are not compatible
Allow sample IDs to be numbers
test_bacteria_full fails - Cannot invoke method getAt() on null object
ERROR ~ Error executing process > 'NFCORE_PATHOGENSURVEILLANCE:PREPARE_INPUT:SAMPLESHEET_CHECK (input.csv)'
Find assemblies faild with test run
No need to have the nft-utils-0.0.3.jar file
Investigate Ariba for detecting genes from raw reads
batch small jobs to lower runner startup overhead
Try using `gtExtras` for tables in report
Pipeline version shown as dev in report
Consider incorperating geneHapR visualizations
Should we report the number of core genes that were used to build the core gene phylogeny?
Number of core genes in report

changes to metro chart
Call method error?
Error with API key when downloading assemblies
IQTREE model error
Align whole long reads instead of chopping them up, perhaps using minimap2
Update bwa mem to bwamem2
Pipeline errors on graphtyper, can't find a bam file.
Save messages.tsv and versions.yml somewhere in the main input besides the report input
Update BUSCO_DOWNLOAD to add lineage to output folder name

namespaces error with bwa

Change mafft to run in a batch per phylogeny cluster output

Consider combining shared parts of the BUSCO and core gene phylogeny workflows into a single workflow
Singularity cqls error: samplesheet_check
Input data format rework

.command.sh: line 7: sourmash: command not found
Consider combining sample and reference metdata into a single sheet
Track original row number in sample data sheet for reporting errors to the user
Add option to error and stop execution instead of issuing warnings when checking sample sheet
With dorado correct producing fasta read files, could the pipeline take fasta files as input?
Set enable = FALSE instead of erroring when reasonable in `check_samplesheet.R`
Handle biosamples that are assocaited with assemblies instead of reads
Better handle biosamples that have multiple SRA runs asscoiated with them
PICK_ASSEMBLIES is running when it should not.
